# Settlement

> **Feature delivered — acceptance criteria.** Generated from the as-built BDD tests in
> `test/stories/settlement_story_test.exs`. Every scenario below is an ExUnit test driving the
> real Codemojex game, so the catalogue cannot drift from the code.

**2 scenarios.**

## Scenario: closing a game pays the whole diamond pool to the leader

- **Given** a single player who has scored on the board
- **When** the game is closed
- **Then** the leader is paid the seeded pool in diamonds

## Scenario: a game pays exactly once — a second close is a no-op

- **Given** a game that has already been closed and paid
- **When** the game is closed again (the perfect-crack vs timer race)
- **Then** the second close pays nothing — the balance is unchanged
